components.name: CLI
components.responsibility: Entry point for agent orchestration via command line

components.name: WorkOrderLoader
components.responsibility: Loads and deserializes work orders from intake sources

components.name: Normalizer
components.responsibility: Parses and normalises raw specification documents into a structured spec tree

components.name: Planner
components.responsibility: Generates architecture plans and decomposes work into tasks

components.name: DAGScheduler
components.responsibility: Arranges tasks into a DAG respecting dependencies and critical path

components.name: HarnessRunner
components.responsibility: Executes tasks in the DAG and verifies consistency of outputs

components.name: PolicyEngine
components.responsibility: Enforces governance policies and rules across the pipeline

components.name: BudgetManager
components.responsibility: Tracks token and resource budgets for agentic runs

components.name: ToolRegistry
components.responsibility: Registry of available tools that agents can invoke

components.name: EvidenceRegistry
components.responsibility: Stores and indexes evidence produced during pipeline execution

components.name: WorkspaceDEV
components.responsibility: Isolated development workspace for code generation and testing

components.name: WorkspaceQA
components.responsibility: Isolated QA workspace for validation and review

components.name: AgentQARelease
components.responsibility: Coordinates QA signoff and release approval gate

components.name: FrontendWeb
components.responsibility: Vanilla JS single-page application serving the municipal interface

components.name: BackendAPI
components.responsibility: Node HTTP API gateway that routes requests to domain services

components.name: ServicioAutenticacionAcademica
components.responsibility: Academic authentication and identity management service

components.name: ServicioDocumental
components.responsibility: Document management and archival service

components.name: ServicioExpedientes
components.responsibility: Expedient (case file) tracking and management service

components.name: ServicioCorrespondencia
components.responsibility: Internal and external correspondence tracking service

components.name: ServicioCiudadano
components.responsibility: Citizen profile and relationship management service

components.name: ServicioOIRS
components.responsibility: OIRS (citizen complaints and requests) service

components.name: ServicioNotificaciones
components.responsibility: Notification dispatch service (email, SMS, in-app)

components.name: ServicioReportabilidad
components.responsibility: Reporting and analytics service for generating structured reports

components.name: RepositorioPostgreSQL
components.responsibility: Central PostgreSQL database repository for all domain data

components.name: AlmacenamientoArchivosSimulado
components.responsibility: Simulated file storage service for development and testing

components.name: Auditoria
components.responsibility: Audit logging and traceability service for all domain operations

decisions.title: Ruta canónica de notificaciones
decisions.decision: Use /intranet/notifications for internal users, /portal/notifications for authenticated citizens
consequences: Frontend must implement two distinct route entries
Backend API-040 must serve both surfaces
Navigation menus must differentiate by actor

decisions.title: Administración de tipos de trámite
decisions.context: P-10 has no concrete administrative endpoint association
alternatives: Embed CRUD in existing document-types endpoint
consequences: 3 new endpoints added beyond the original 40
Frontend P-10 screen connects to these endpoints

decisions.title: Administración de entidades externas
decisions.context: P-11 has no concrete administrative endpoint association
alternatives: Manage external entities through generic admin endpoint
consequences: 3 new endpoints added beyond the original 40
Frontend P-11 screen connects to these endpoints

decisions.title: Login ciudadano
decisions.context: API-002 (/api/v1/auth/citizen-login) documented but not implemented; frontend declares it
decisions.decision: Keep POST /api/v1/auth/citizen-login as mandatory endpoint; implement as academic simulation initially
alternatives: Merge with internal login using role parameter
Remove citizen-login and use only internal login
consequences: Separate auth flow for citizens
Must differentiate from internal login in backend
Simulation acceptable for v0002

decisions.title: Creación de solicitud ciudadana
decisions.context: API-034 documented as POST /api/v1/public/tramites/{id}/requests; backend implements POST /api/v1/citizen/requests
decisions.decision: Define POST /api/v1/public/tramites/{id}/requests as canonical contract; register POST /api/v1/citizen/requests as legacy compatibility endpoint
consequences: Backend must implement both during migration
Frontend P-25 must use canonical route
Legacy endpoint can be deprecated in v0003

decisions.title: Anexos asociados a versiones
decisions.context: BR-017 requires attachment version association; document_attachments lacks version_id
decisions.decision: Add document_version_id (nullable FK to document_versions) to document_attachments
alternatives: Keep attachments at document level only
consequences: Schema migration required for document_attachments
New attachments must include version_id
Null allowed for legacy migration

decisions.title: Referencia a versión anterior
decisions.context: BR-021 requires explicit previous version reference; document_versions has no previous_version_id
decisions.decision: Add previous_version_id (nullable self-referencing FK) to document_versions
alternatives: Use created_at ordering to determine previous version
Add sequence number instead of FK
consequences: Schema migration required
First version has null previous_version_id
Enables version chain traversal

decisions.title: Numeración documental
decisions.context: Document numbering rule lacks dedicated model
decisions.decision: Add UNIQUE(document_type_id, document_number) constraint; numbering managed by service layer with sequence per document type
consequences: Unique constraint required at DB level
Service must generate next number per type
Migration needed for existing documents

decisions.title: OIRS anónima
decisions.context: Anonymous OIRS contact data not represented on oirs_cases
decisions.decision: Add contact_name, contact_email, contact_phone, contact_consent (nullable) to oirs_cases; enforce name + (email or phone) + consent for anonymous submissions
consequences: Schema migration needed for oirs_cases
Validation service must check anonymous vs authenticated
Frontend P-27 must show/hide contact fields based on auth status

decisions.title: Relación circular usuarios-departamentos
decisions.context: Departments/users foreign keys require deferred migration ordering
decisions.decision: Create departments without manager; create users with department_id; add manager_user_id via migration; keep both FK nullable during bootstrap
alternatives: Single migration with circular FK deferred
consequences: Three-step migration required
Service layer must validate manager belongs to department
Bootstrap script needed for initial data

decisions.title: Relación circular documentos-versiones
decisions.context: documents.current_version_id and document_versions.document_id require deferred migration ordering
decisions.decision: Create documents without current_version_id; create document_versions; add current_version_id FK via migration
consequences: Three-step migration required
Document service must update current_version_id on each version creation
Query performance better with explicit FK

decisions.title: Cantidad de actores
decisions.context: Normalizer found 9 actors; previous expectation was 8
decisions.decision: Keep 9 actors. ACT-007 appears twice in source (as two separate table rows) with distinct descriptions; both are valid entries.
alternatives: Reduce to 7 by combining visitor and citizen
consequences: Actor count is 9, not 8
WorkOrder minimum_scope may need updating in future
Traceability must reference all 9

decisions.title: Frontend objetivo
decisions.context: Current frontend is vanilla JavaScript served by Node HTTP
decisions.decision: Keep vanilla JS as baseline compatibility for v0001; define React as target architecture for v0002; do not implement React in this phase
consequences: Frontend must remain functional during transition
React implementation is planned but not executed
Current frontend remains the executable baseline

decisions.title: Persistencia
decisions.context: Backend uses in-memory storage; PostgreSQL is declared but not used
decisions.decision: Keep memory as v0001 compatibility; define PostgreSQL as mandatory persistence for QA and v0002 target
consequences: Backend must support both persistence modes during migration
PostgreSQL migration is planned but not executed in this phase
Current in-memory backend remains the executable baseline

decisions.title: Autenticación e integraciones externas
decisions.context: Institutional auth, Clave Unica, FirmaGob, SII are referenced but not implemented
decisions.decision: Define all external integrations as academic simulations; do not present as production integrations
consequences: Auth flows are simulated with test credentials
No real external API calls are made
Documentation must clearly label simulations

decisions.title: Conteo de endpoints
decisions.context: Original catalog has 40 endpoints; ADR-002 and ADR-003 add 6 more
decisions.decision: Target contract may exceed 40 endpoints. Track 40 original + additional + legacy + technical endpoints separately.
consequences: Endpoint count in planning report > 40
Technical endpoints (health, metrics) are not counted in functional total
Traceability must differentiate original vs added
